productName: Miracle Alien Cookies ( I/H ) - Plaid Jacket BHO Elevated THC Cured Resin Disposable 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Miracle Alien Cookies oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, a sweet, doughy, earthy dessert aroma with a euphoric, relaxing feel, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
